title: How does monday canvas invite users?
excerpt:
The work canvas app asks permission to users:write. It then can invite users to the main monday account. How is this possible? 
There should be an undocumented invite users graphQL mutation. Does anyone have any info on …

posts.author: tasostester1 (tasos)
posts.cookedHtml:
The work canvas app asks permission to users:write. It then can invite users to the main monday account. How is this possible?

There should be an undocumented invite users graphQL mutation. Does anyone have any info on this?

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tasostester1
Nice to see you here again

I have foreword you question and you should get un answer soon.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
The canvas app was built by monday developers, so it has access to APIs that are not publicly available.

Are you looking for a way to invite users to a monday account, from inside an app?

posts.author: tasostester1 (tasos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Dipro, yes that would be great!
Is there a way to do this?
On v1 there was but on v2 it is removed

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s not possible to invite users via API – only via SCIM if your account is using SSO.
